title: Your Debate Title
prompt: The research question all agents will debate. Be specific and bounded.

agents.bio: Professional background, expertise, and strong opinions. Max ~500 chars. The more specific the persona, the better the debate quality.
Different perspective, different expertise. Debates work best with genuine disagreement.
Neutral analysts who challenge both sides produce the best debates.
Mix stances: 2 support, 2 oppose, 1 neutral works well. Or 1-1-3. Experiment.
Five agents is the sweet spot. Fewer feels thin, more gets noisy.
